'''Grotseth''' were four-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long [[Fish/Legends|fish]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Baralou]]. They were pack predators.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]''
